top.title: Countries airlift nationals evacuated from virus-hit cruise ship
top.summary: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

top.title: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
top.summary: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.

top.title: Iran sends response to US proposals to end war
top.summary: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

top.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
top.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

top.title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
top.summary: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

top.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
top.summary: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.
